prompt:
Subject:
Afternoon Cat Time

Person/Expression:
A woman in her 20s. Clear skin, natural makeup, dark brown long hair with bangs. Gently smiling with a natural gaze toward the camera, a clean Japanese-style portrait.

Clothing/Pose:
Light blue short-sleeved shirt blouse, white high-waisted shorts, white thin-strap sandals. One hand in a pocket, the other gently resting on a large cat's head. Standing in a relaxed pose with legs lightly crossed.

Background/Lighting:
A bright indoor studio with pale blue walls. Houseplants and a small wooden stand on the left. Natural afternoon light enters through a window, casting soft shadows of leaves on the wall and floor. Next to her is a fluffy, large white and gray cat about waist-high, looking up curiously with large blue eyes.

Composition/Camera:
Vertical composition, full-body portrait. Person positioned on the left, cat in the foreground on the right. Slightly low angle, 35mm lens, natural depth of field, background softly blurred.

Texture/Style:
High-definition 4K, realistic photo-style AI image, transparency like a Japanese photo book, natural skin texture, soft tones, bright and clean summer atmosphere.

Negative:
Low quality, unnatural face, unnatural hands, extra fingers, missing fingers, distorted fingers, collapsed face, distorted body, broken clothes, unnatural cat body, extra legs, excessive processing, excessive skin correction, AI-specific unnatural texture, text, logo, watermark
